sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ اعْتُبِرَ التَّمْرُ "خُبْزَ الصَّحْرَاءِ" لِقُرُونٍ طَوِيلَةٍ نَظَرًا لِقِيمَتِهِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الِاسْتِثْنَائِيَّةِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ عَلَى الصُّمُودِ.
sentences.translation: Urme se već vijekovima smatraju 'hljebom pustinje' zbog njihove izuzetne nutritivne vrijednosti i izdržljivosti.
sentences.translationEn: Dates have been considered the 'bread of the desert' for many centuries due to their exceptional nutritional value and resilience.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ مَنْظُورٍ عِلْمِيٍّ، إِذَا تَنَاوَلَ الْمَرْءُ كَمِيَّةً مُعْتَدِلَةً مِنَ التَّمْرِ يَوْمِيًّا، فَإِنَّ الْجِسْمَ يَتَلَقَّى جُرْعَةً مُرَكَّزَةً مِنَ الْمَعَادِنِ الْأَسَاسِيَّةِ وَالسُّكَّرِيَّاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Iz naučne perspektive, ako osoba svakodnevno konzumira umjerenu količinu urmi, tijelo prima koncentrisanu dozu esencijalnih minerala i prirodnih šećera.
sentences.translationEn: From a scientific perspective, if one consumes a moderate amount of dates daily, the body receives a concentrated dose of essential minerals and natural sugars.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، يُقْرَنُ التَّمْرُ بِاللَّبَنِ أَوْ الزَّبَادِي لِتَكْوِينِ وَجْبَةٍ مُتَوَازِنَةٍ تَمُدُّ الْجِسْمَ بِالطَّاقَةِ خِلَالَ فَتَرَاتِ الصِّيَامِ الطَّوِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: U mnogim arapskim društvima, urme se kombinuju s mlaćenicom ili jogurtom kako bi se formirao uravnotežen obrok koji tijelu daje energiju tokom dugih perioda posta.
sentences.translationEn: In many Arab societies, dates are paired with buttermilk or yogurt to form a balanced meal that provides the body with energy during long periods of fasting.

sentences.arabic: يُلَاحَظُ أَنَّ زِرَاعَةَ أَشْجَارِ النَّخِيلِ قَدْ أَثَّرَتْ عَلَى الْمَشْهَدِ الْمِعْمَارِيِّ وَالِاقْتِصَادِيِّ لِلْعَدِيدِ مِنْ مُدُنِ الْوَاحَاتِ عَبْرَ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Primjećuje se da je uzgoj palmi kroz historiju uticao na arhitektonski i ekonomski pejzaž mnogih gradova u oazama.
sentences.translationEn: It is observed that the cultivation of palm trees has influenced the architectural and economic landscape of many oasis cities throughout history.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، تَبْقَى هَذِهِ الثَّمَرَةُ الْمُتَوَاضِعَةُ رَمْزًا لِلرَّخَاءِ وَحَجَرَ زَاوِيَةٍ فِي النِّظَامِ الْغِذَائِيِّ التَّقْلِيدِيِّ فِي جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ الشَّرْقِ الْأَوْسَطِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, ovaj skromni plod ostaje simbol blagostanja i kamen temeljac tradicionalne ishrane širom Bliskog istoka.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, this humble fruit remains a symbol of prosperity and a cornerstone of the traditional diet throughout the Middle East.
